note: Template only. Create fresh jobs in the target environment rather than copying IDs or runtime state.

payload.text: Executive assistant sweep. Use the executive-assistant skill. Handle this reminder internally and only message the principal if there is new actionable information.

payload.message: Use the business-development skill. Run the default daily prospecting batch.

payload.text: Executive assistant sweep. Use the executive-assistant skill. This optional boundary job is useful when your desired sweep window cannot be expressed cleanly in one cron expression.

payload.message: In your OpenClaw repo, perform the nightly backup to the configured Git remote. Use a deterministic allowlisted git flow instead of exploratory checks: stage only the restore-critical tracked paths you intend to back up, check whether the staged diff is empty, and only commit / push when it is not. Do not add secrets, runtime state, logs, media, browser state, or ignored files. If push fails or something needs human attention, send a short proactive update. Otherwise stay silent.

Check whether an OpenClaw update is available. If there is an update, install it using the gateway update tool. If there is no update, do nothing. Keep this run silent unless there is a meaningful problem that needs human attention.
